response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar

ENTITY ProductionOrder
PK order_id
ATTR order_id : integer : PK
ATTR registration_date : date

ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR material_description : varchar

ENTITY OperationType
PK operation_type_id
ATTR operation_type_id : integer : PK
ATTR operation_type_description : varchar

ENTITY WorkCenter
PK work_center_id
ATTR work_center_id : integer : PK

ENTITY OperationExecution
PK execution_id
ATTR execution_id : integer : PK
ATTR start_datetime : datetime
ATTR quantity_processed : float

REL ProductionOrder -> Client : 1..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
REL OperationExecution -> ProductionOrder : 1..N -> 1 : FK=order_id
REL OperationExecution -> Material : 1..N -> 1 : FK=material_id
REL OperationExecution -> OperationType : 1..N -> 1 : FK=operation_type_id
REL OperationExecution -> WorkCenter : 1..N -> 1 : FK=work_center_id
